title: Murat 131 in Deep Space
description: An epic and absurd cinematic 10-second shot of a vintage Turkish Murat 131 sedan drifting majestically through deep space.

shot.type: wide cinematic tracking shot with cockpit cutaways
shot.subject: Murat 131, vintage Turkish sedan (Tofaş Murat 131), faded beige paint, slightly rusty bumper, one headlight crooked
shot.action: majestically drifting through deep space, rotating slowly on its axis as if in zero gravity
shot.camera_movement: slow orbital dolly around the car, occasional dramatic push-in on the hood ornament, Kubrick-style symmetrical framing

environment.location: deep space, somewhere between Jupiter and Saturn
environment.background: swirling nebulas in purple and magenta, distant stars, a small planet with rings in the corner
environment.scale: vast cosmic emptiness contrasting with the humble little sedan
environment.atmosphere: absolute silence of space, occasional cosmic dust drifting past

cinematography.style: 2001: A Space Odyssey meets Yeşilçam comedy
cinematography.lens: 70mm wide, deep focus, slight fisheye on close-ups
cinematography.color_grade: deep cosmic blues and purples with warm tungsten glow from car's interior dome light
cinematography.lighting: key light from a distant sun creating long dramatic shadows, soft fill from nebula glow

comedic_details.interior: driver's seat empty but a worry bead (tespih) floats in zero-g near the rearview mirror, a half-eaten simit drifts past the dashboard
comedic_details.exterior_quirks: Turkish license plate '34 MURAT 131', a small evil eye (nazar boncuğu) suction-cupped to the rear window, faded 'Maşallah' sticker on the back
comedic_details.physics_humor: the car's antenna wobbles gently, exhaust pipe occasionally puffs out a tiny cartoon smoke ring
comedic_details.unexpected_element: a single çay glass with steam still rising floats serenely beside the car, defying all logic

sound_design_cue.audio: Strauss-style orchestral swell (Also Sprach Zarathustra parody), then suddenly a faint Turkish folk arabesque song crackling from the car radio, distant engine sputter

prompt.mood: epic and absurd, dignified yet ridiculous, cosmic loneliness with Anatolian soul
